title: 路透：習近平親自指令外交官以戰狼態度回應西方

replies.msg:
路透社31日引述多名現任和前任中國外交官，證實習近平去年親自向中國外交部外交官下達指令，在外交層面要宣示中國的強硬立場。

報導說，新任中外交部發言人趙立堅去年八月從巴基斯坦調回北京時，由於他在社交媒體的強硬言論，受到外交部年青員工的熱烈歡迎。

路透社接觸過的中國外交官當中，有兩名人士證實，中國外交部變得鷹派當道，全因是習近平個人作風。習近平去年給外交官的親筆手寫便條，指出面對國際挑戰（例如中美關係惡化）採取更強硬立場，要表現出 「鬥爭精神」 (「fighting spirit )。路透社消息指，習近平親自指示應該強硬駁斥西方抹黑中國的言論。

https://www.rfa.org/mandarin/Xinwen/WUL0331A-03312020063710.html/ampRFA?__twitter_impression=true

原文：

Their emergence （鷹派外交官）has caused a rift with the old foreign policy establishment, amid worries that increasingly assertive rhetoric could put the country on a dangerous collision course with powers like the United States, they said.

The shift followed instructions that President Xi Jinping issued diplomats in a memo last year, calling on them to show more “fighting spirit”, said two people with direct knowledge of the matter.

“This is the first time since 1949 that the ‘new hawks’ have the power to reshape China’s diplomatic policy,” said Qin Xiaoying, who was a director of the ruling Communist Party’s international propaganda department and is now a researcher with the China Foundation for International and Strategic Studies in Beijing.

⋯⋯HANDWRITTEN MESSAGE

Xi gave his instructions about adopting a tougher stance in the face of international challenges, like deteriorating relations with the United States, in a handwritten message to diplomats last year, two people with direct knowledge of the matter told Reuters.

State Councillor and Foreign Minister Wang Yi gave the same message to officials attending the celebration of the 70th anniversary of the ministry’s founding, Reuters reported in December.

https://www.reuters.com/article/us-china-diplomacy-insight-idUSKBN21I0F8

replies.msg:
行胡溫舊路，咁搵強仔做總書記得啦，幾時輪到小學雞？
甴大大出嚟做偉大領袖，就係要發強國夢，同美國佬挑機。
無產階級嘅博奕期極短，死後名聲、子孫未來通通唔重要，因為佢必然要將事做絕，否則自己人生安全馬上有危險。
呢件事反映甴近平覺得自己黨內勢危，連外交部呢個冇決策能力嘅技術官僚架構都容不下唔走習路線嘅人。
沙盤推演落去，遲早甴大大要打一場對外戰爭(最大可能係台灣)嚟證明支那國真係喺佢領導底下大國崛起。
雖然戰狼路線落去的話未來要打呢場可能會導致亡黨亡國嘅戰爭，但如果唔戰狼甴大大馬上被人逼官清算。
大家要記住，支拿係一個互害社會，國家利益 ≠ 黨利益≠ 領導個人利益。
習近平最失敗嘅係，佢講大話呃蟻民嗰套講到連自己都信埋，自為自己真係戰無不勝

你唔記得咗，習近平上台係江派同團派嘅妥協產物。
共匪元老本身淨係諗住比佢hea住做一屆，之後個位交返比孫政才同胡春華。
但習近平唔甘心做光緒，所以佢高舉強國夢旗幟，表示喺自己英明領導下，支那國能夠大國堀起，挑戰美國，而元老咪亦都鬥唔到共匪嘅「寧左勿右」哲學，所以容忍習近平繼續當權。
所以你見到，對習近平嚟講只有搞鳩外國呢條路行，否則，當佢唔再舉左旗，其他人就會馬上群起而攻之郁鳩佢

quote.msg:
路透社31日引述多名現任和前任中國外交官，證實習近平去年親自向中國外交部外交官下達指令，在外交層面要宣示中國的強硬立場。

報導說，新任中外交部發言人趙立堅去年八月從巴基斯坦調回北京時，由於他在社交媒體的強硬言論，受到外交部年青員工的熱烈歡迎。

路透社接觸過的中國外交官當中，有兩名人士證實，中國外交部變得鷹派當道，全因是習近平個人作風。習近平去年給外交官的親筆手寫便條，指出面對國際挑戰（例如中美關係惡化）採取更強硬立場，要表現出 「鬥爭精神」 (「fighting spirit )。路透社消息指，習近平親自指示應該強硬駁斥西方抹黑中國的言論。

https://www.rfa.org/mandarin/Xinwen/WUL0331A-03312020063710.html/ampRFA?__twitter_impression=true

pinned.msg:
原文：

Their emergence （鷹派外交官）has caused a rift with the old foreign policy establishment, amid worries that increasingly assertive rhetoric could put the country on a dangerous collision course with powers like the United States, they said.

The shift followed instructions that President Xi Jinping issued diplomats in a memo last year, calling on them to show more “fighting spirit”, said two people with direct knowledge of the matter.

“This is the first time since 1949 that the ‘new hawks’ have the power to reshape China’s diplomatic policy,” said Qin Xiaoying, who was a director of the ruling Communist Party’s international propaganda department and is now a researcher with the China Foundation for International and Strategic Studies in Beijing.

⋯⋯HANDWRITTEN MESSAGE

Xi gave his instructions about adopting a tougher stance in the face of international challenges, like deteriorating relations with the United States, in a handwritten message to diplomats last year, two people with direct knowledge of the matter told Reuters.

State Councillor and Foreign Minister Wang Yi gave the same message to officials attending the celebration of the 70th anniversary of the ministry’s founding, Reuters reported in December.

https://www.reuters.com/article/us-china-diplomacy-insight-idUSKBN21I0F8
